name: Formula E Predictions
summary: Race and championship forecasts for the ABB FIA Formula E World Championship.
description: The first all-electric series on the MotorsportVerse core: a driver-forward skill blend (Elo seeded from 2019+ seasons + finishing history + optional gradient-boosted signal) with post-qualifying grid conditioning, Monte Carlo win/podium probabilities calibrated separately for street and permanent circuits, and a championship projection that accounts for pole and fastest-lap bonus points. Runs on the real 2025-26 season: official results flow from the live Formula E API into a committed, reviewable snapshot, with doubleheader weekends modeled as separate rounds. Backfilled and backtested across twelve seasons of series history. Experimental while forward accuracy accrues over real rounds.
datasets: Formula E API (official results, snapshotted to a committed file)
